architecture_summary: Hybrid RAG: pdfplumber+PaddleOCR extraction, structure-aware chunking, BM25+gemini-embedding-2-preview hybrid search with RRF fusion over 512-token embedding-aware chunks, reranker disabled, gpt-4.1-mini streaming generation over adaptive top-k chunks (up to 4), answer-aware grounding from cited source blocks, 3-tier null detection.
